name: CoreOptimizer
short_description: CoreOptimizer improves your game playing performance through optimizing your computer's hardware resource.
detailed_description:
CoreOptimizer improves your game playing performance through optimizing your computer's hardware resource. It could also be used as a general system optimization tool.

Features


Core Optimization
  • Restrict system processes to run on a single core such that all remaining cores are left for game.
  • Run game with high priority.
  • Run game on a single core(Suitable for single core game not optimized for multi-cores).
  • Prohibit hyper-threading for game.
  • Run game on designated multi-cores.
  • Auto launch with OS start.
  • Constrain Web browser to run on a single core.
  • Filter applications to not be restricted to single core.
  • Run any streaming software on designated core.
  • Restrict the priority of any streaming software.
  • List of processes to select for optimization.
  • Kill selected process.
  • Copy a process's PID to be used in Memory Clean.
  • Stop optimization.

Game Utility(including Steam, non-Steam games and applications)
  • Auto detection of all Steam games to be launched for optimization.
  • Manually add any game or application for optimization.
  • Auto detection of designated games for optimization.
  • Steam Store and Community link.
  • Favorite your game.
  • Add launch options of Steam game.
  • Customize display name of Steam game.
  • Change display image of any game or application.

Memory Cleaning
  • Used memory in GB.
  • Memory footprint in %.
  • One key press to clean memory for all processes.
  • List of statistic data after memory cleaning.
  • Chart display of the memory uses in real time.

Hardware Analyzer
  • List all the resources belonging to your computer, including CPU, GPU, RAM, OS, Motherboard, HDD, Optical Drives, Audio, and Network etc.

FPS Benchmark
  • Paste copied PID for fps tracking of the process.
  • Auto detection of all windows belonging to the game launched within CoreOptimizer.
  • Select the detected game window for benchmark.
  • One key press to start FPS tracking.
  • Show real time FPS in the tracked game window.
  • Chart display of FPS data for statistic analysis.

Disk Compression
  • Four compression method.
  • Batch compression of all Steam games.
  • Select a folder for compression.
  • Compress the selected folder.
  • Decompress the selected folder.
  • List all compressed folders.

System tray
  • Show/hide the window.
  • Auto remember latest played 5 games.
  • Stop optimization.
  • Recover window position

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Arabic, Korean
